tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within or close to normal ranges except for mildly decreased total cholesterol and low HDL cholesterol. Renal function, glucose metabolism, and electrolytes are normal. The low HDL may increase cardiovascular risk; consider lifestyle modification if clinically appropriate. No evidence of acute pathology from these results.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
